title: Real-estate lead-gen listing-media package — narrated property tour cut from room clips + cleaned agent VO, scored to a licensed music bed, with a fully graded hero thumbnail, branded lower-third/logo bug, twilight composite cover, and platform-ready Feed/Stories/Reels exports
one_line_ask: Turn six room-by-room walkthrough clips and a rough, reverberant agent voiceover into a lead-gen Facebook/Reels property tour: order the rooms from a footage summary, cut a tight first-3-seconds-hook walkthrough, isolate and clean the VO from its music/ambient bed, lay a licensed track under it, and in parallel build the campaign's still package — straighten/crop/grade a hero interior to a consistent listing look, recover blown windows with masked edits, generative-expand it to fill 1:1 and 9:16 covers, drop in an Adobe-Stock twilight sky on the exterior, and place a vectorized brokerage logo + recommended-type lower-third — then export the tour and covers in Feed (1:1), Stories (9:16) and Reels (9:16) sizes.
deliverables: Narrated tour-guide-style property walkthrough MP4/H.264, rooms ordered by the footage summary, with a hook in the first 3 seconds and the cleaned VO scored to a licensed music bed
Cleaned, de-reverbed agent voiceover isolated from its rough music/ambient bed (broadcast-ready dialogue stem)
Key-segment summary + rough transcript of the walkthrough footage used to choose which rooms lead the cut
Fully graded hero interior still, levelled and cropped, with blown windows recovered via masked highlight/exposure edits, finished to one campaign 'listing look' preset
Twilight-sky exterior cover (Adobe Stock licensed sky composited behind the listing exterior) sized for the campaign
Branded lower-third / logo bug: brokerage logo vectorized to clean SVG + recommended listing typography for the agent name and price strip
Generative-expanded hero reframed to fill 1:1 (Feed) and 9:16 (Stories/Reels) covers without cropping the room, plus thumbnail crop
Platform-ready exports of the tour and covers: Facebook Feed 1:1, Stories 9:16, Reels 9:16, MP4/H.264 + matching cover stills
One consistent aesthetic (white balance, tone, preset) shared across video thumbnail and every still
source: Freelancer db-366 'Lead-Generating Real Estate Video Reels' composited with db-1885 'Vibrant Social Media Reels Creation' (multi-size social exports) and db-641 'Fun YouTube Podcast Editing' (VO de-reverb/music-bed cleanup), extended with the listing-stills + branded-cover sub-deliverables that a real estate "listing media package" bundles — chosen to span Premiere-class video/audio (local ffmpeg, honest) plus a deep Lightroom/Photoshop/Illustrator/Stock connector chain on the still + branding leg.
